content.fact_text: Implements a production-ready ReconciliationCacheManager with atomic distributed locking and inventory state management.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides robust, fault-tolerant distributed locking and caching for SKU-range inventory reconciliation using Redis, featuring automatic TTL renewal and circuit breaking for high availability.
interfaces: setInventoryState(productId: string, state: Record<string, any>, ttlSeconds: number): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides mandatory infrastructure for SKU-range synchronization and state persistence in the inventory reconciliation pipeline.
